source_location.source_line: uint32 current_loc; // sample location of next frame to decode
uint32 serial; // stream serial number for verification
int last_seg;  // flag that we're on the last segment
int last_seg_which; // what was the segment number of the last seg?
int page_crc_tests; // only in push_mode: number of tests active; -1 if not searching
uint32  goal_crc;    // expected crc if match
int     bytes_left;  // bytes left in packet
int     bytes_done;  // bytes processed in _current_ chunk
uint32  sample_loc;  // granule pos encoded in page
static int error(vorb *f, enum STBVorbisError e)

macros.name: DECODE_RAW
macros.value: if (f->valid_bits < STB_VORBIS_FAST_HUFFMAN_LENGTH) prep_huffman(f); var = f->acc & FAST_HUFFMAN_TABLE_MASK; var = c->fast_huffman[var]; if (var >= 0) { int n = c->codeword_lengths[var]; f->acc >>= n; f->valid_bits -= n; if (f->valid_bits < 0) { f->valid_bits = 0; var = -1; } } else { var = codebook_decode_scalar_raw(f,c); }
